def negative_nested_list_search_map_candidate():
    rule_id = "nested_list_search_map_candidate"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Nested linear list searches that look like they want a temporary map or set index."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
